# ɳClaw Desktop — Build Artifacts & Updater Feed

Reference for CI artifact paths, updater endpoint status, and checksum verification for the Tauri 2 desktop application.

---

## Platform Workflows

| Platform | Workflow | Runner | Artifacts |
|---|---|---|---|
| Linux x64 | `desktop-linux.yml` | `ubuntu-22.04` | AppImage, .deb, .rpm |
| Linux arm64 | `desktop-linux.yml` | `ubuntu-22.04-arm` | AppImage, .deb, .rpm |
| macOS arm64 | `desktop-macos.yml` | `macos-14` | .dmg (notarized) |
| macOS x64 | `desktop-macos.yml` | `macos-13` | .dmg (notarized) |
| Windows x64 | `desktop-windows.yml` | `windows-2022` | .msi, .exe (NSIS) |

All workflows trigger on `push: tags: ['v*']` and `workflow_dispatch`. All reference `nclaw/desktop` (canonical path as of P101 monorepo restructure — the old `nclaw/apps/desktop` path no longer exists).

## Artifact Paths (post-build, within GHA runner)

| Platform | Target triple | Bundle path |
|---|---|---|
| Linux | `x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu` | `nclaw/desktop/src-tauri/target/<target>/release/bundle/{appimage,deb,rpm}/` |
| Linux | `aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu` | `nclaw/desktop/src-tauri/target/<target>/release/bundle/{appimage,deb,rpm}/` |
| macOS | `aarch64-apple-darwin` | `nclaw/desktop/src-tauri/target/<target>/release/bundle/{dmg,macos}/` |
| macOS | `x86_64-apple-darwin` | `nclaw/desktop/src-tauri/target/<target>/release/bundle/{dmg,macos}/` |
| Windows | `x86_64-pc-windows-msvc` | `nclaw/desktop/src-tauri/target/<target>/release/bundle/{msi,nsis}/` |

## GHA Artifact Names (upload-artifact)

| Platform | Artifact name |
|---|---|
| Linux x64 | `desktop-linux-x64` |
| Linux arm64 | `desktop-linux-arm64` |
| macOS arm64 | `desktop-macos-aarch64-apple-darwin-notarized` |
| macOS x64 | `desktop-macos-x86_64-apple-darwin-notarized` |
| Windows x64 | `desktop-windows-x64` |

---

## Updater Configuration

**Config location:** `nclaw/desktop/src-tauri/tauri.conf.json` — `plugins.updater`

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| `endpoints` | `["https://packages.nself.org/desktop/latest-{{target}}.json"]` |
| `pubkey` | minisign public key (base64-encoded, see tauri.conf.json) |
| `createUpdaterArtifacts` | `true` (in `bundle` section — added v1.1.3) |

The `{{target}}` placeholder is the Tauri 2 template syntax for the platform target triple (e.g. `x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu`, `aarch64-apple-darwin`, `x86_64-pc-windows-msvc`).

### Updater Endpoint Status (v1.1.3)

| Endpoint | Status |
|---|---|
| `https://packages.nself.org/desktop/latest-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.json` | Not yet published — requires tag `v1.1.3` trigger + artifact upload to packages.nself.org |
| `https://packages.nself.org/desktop/latest-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.json` | Not yet published |
| `https://packages.nself.org/desktop/latest-aarch64-apple-darwin.json` | Not yet published |
| `https://packages.nself.org/desktop/latest-x86_64-apple-darwin.json` | Not yet published |
| `https://packages.nself.org/desktop/latest-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.json` | Not yet published |

**Publish step:** after CI builds all platform artifacts on tag `v1.1.3`, upload each updater `.json` + signed artifact to `packages.nself.org/desktop/`. Each `.json` follows the Tauri updater feed format (`version`, `notes`, `pub_date`, `platforms` map).

---

## Checksums (v1.1.3)

Checksums are generated by the Tauri bundler when `createUpdaterArtifacts: true` is set. The `.sig` files (minisign signatures) are produced alongside each artifact. Actual SHA-256 checksums will be recorded here after the first successful CI run on tag `v1.1.3`.

| Artifact | SHA-256 | Source |
|---|---|---|
| `nclaw_1.1.3_amd64.AppImage` | pending tag `v1.1.3` CI run | GHA artifact `desktop-linux-x64` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3_arm64.AppImage` | pending tag `v1.1.3` CI run | GHA artifact `desktop-linux-arm64` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3_amd64.deb` | pending | GHA artifact `desktop-linux-x64` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3_arm64.deb` | pending | GHA artifact `desktop-linux-arm64` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3-1.x86_64.rpm` | pending | GHA artifact `desktop-linux-x64` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3-1.aarch64.rpm` | pending | GHA artifact `desktop-linux-arm64` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3_aarch64.dmg` | pending | GHA artifact `desktop-macos-aarch64-apple-darwin-notarized` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3_x64.dmg` | pending | GHA artifact `desktop-macos-x86_64-apple-darwin-notarized` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3_x64-setup.exe` | pending | GHA artifact `desktop-windows-x64` |
| `nclaw_1.1.3_x64_en-US.msi` | pending | GHA artifact `desktop-windows-x64` |

**How to verify after CI completes:**
```bash
# Download artifact from GHA and run:
sha256sum nclaw_1.1.3_amd64.AppImage
# Compare against the .sha256 sidecar produced by the bundler
```

---

## Windows Code Signing

Windows artifacts are currently **unsigned** at v1.1.3. The signtool step in `desktop-windows.yml` is conditional on `secrets.WINDOWS_EV_CERT_THUMBPRINT` being set; until an EV certificate is obtained, the step is a no-op. Wired in ticket T06 (pending EV cert landing).

## macOS Code Signing + Notarization

macOS artifacts are signed with Apple Developer ID Application (`APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY`) and notarized via `xcrun notarytool`. Requires secrets: `APPLE_DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_CERT_P12_BASE64`, `APPLE_DEVELOPER_ID_APPLICATION_CERT_PASSWORD`, `APPLE_KEYCHAIN_PROFILE`, `APPLE_NOTARIZATION_APPLE_ID`, `APPLE_NOTARIZATION_PASSWORD`, `APPLE_DEVELOPER_TEAM_ID`.

---

## Version History

| Version | tauri.conf.json version | createUpdaterArtifacts | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| v1.1.3 | 1.1.3 | true | Added field; all workflow paths verified at `nclaw/desktop` |
| v1.1.2 | 1.1.2 | absent | S00 ship-blocker: linux + windows workflows referenced `nclaw/apps/desktop` (fixed T13/T14) |
